# Project Artifact Set Template

Copy this structure for each new project.

```text
projects/<project-slug>/
  STATUS.md
  DECISIONS.md
  OPEN-QUESTIONS.md
  RISKS.md
  ROADMAP.md
  CHANGELOG.md
  docs/
    00-idea-qualification.md
    00-brief.md
    01-viability.md
    02-features.md
    03-architecture.md
    03b-tech-spec.md
    04-ux-design.md
    05-database-review.md
    06-build.md
    07-qa-testing.md
    08-security-review.md
    09-code-review.md
    10-marketing-strategy.md
    11-pricing-strategy.md
    12-legal-framework.md
    13-roadmap-handoff.md
```

## STATUS.md

```markdown
# <Project Name> Status

Current stage:

Last completed stage:

Verdict:

Next action:

Blocked by:

Repository:

Primary buyer:

MVP summary:
```

## DECISIONS.md

```markdown
# Decisions

| Date | Decision | Reason | Stage | Reversible? |
|---|---|---|---|---|
```

## OPEN-QUESTIONS.md

```markdown
# Open Questions

| Question | Owner | Stage | Blocking? | Resolution |
|---|---|---|---|---|
```

## RISKS.md

```markdown
# Risks

| Risk | Severity | Probability | Mitigation | Owner |
|---|---|---|---|---|
```
